name: Remove Immutable File Attribute - Auditd
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Remove Immutable File Attribute - Auditd
SIGMA Description: Detects removing immutable file attribute.

False positives:
- Administrator interacting with immutable files (e.g. for instance backups).

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chattr%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-i%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Remove Immutable File Attribute - Auditd on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%chattr%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%-i%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Remove Immutable File Attribute - Auditd
